series_metadata.series_title: Scholarship Granting Organizations Tax Credit Applications
series_metadata.series_description: Per ORC 5747.73, the Ohio Attorney General's Office shall receive applications from scholarship granting organizations to be certified so that contributions to the entity qualify for the tax credit. Records include, but are not limited to, a copy of an organization's completed application, agreements, amendments, supporting documentation, reports, and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from receiving application. ; Paper: from receiving application, unless scanned and saved electronically
